name: surendra-systems
description: GitLab group namespace and entry point for all public engineering work. Index of all repositories, documentation, and architecture references.

name: surendra-portfolio
description: This site. Zero-cost personal engineering portfolio with auto-updated tech news. Python scraper + Next.js static site, deployed via GitLab CI to GitLab Pages.

name: surendra-platform
description: Production-grade platform engineering reference implementation: ArgoCD GitOps with round-robin controller sharding, ApplicationSets, CASC for Jenkins, and automated Kubernetes DR using Velero + Ansible-Helm.

name: surendra-mlops
description: MLOps platform reference: model CI/CD pipelines, artifact versioning, secure model deployment on Kubernetes. Covers GenAI model serving, prompt versioning, and ML infrastructure on AWS/GCP.

name: surendra-observability
description: Full SRE observability stack: Prometheus, Grafana, Alertmanager with SLO burn-rate alerting, error budget dashboards, and on-call runbook templates. Based on Google SRE practices.
